data.title: As a sprint orchestrator, I want completion-verifier, approach-decision-maker, and doc-writer agent contracts updated with kudos-aligned behavioral framing
data.description:
As a sprint orchestrator, I need completion-verifier.md, approach-decision-maker.md, and doc-writer.md to have explicit kudos-aligned behavioral contracts so that agents can earn kudos for quality-seeking behavior.

DONE DEFINITIONS:
- completion-verifier.md: UNCERTAIN added as valid overall_verdict; definition: "UNCERTAIN: implementation appears complete but verifier has insufficient confidence to issue PASS — specific areas of concern noted in summary"; output schema updated
- approach-decision-maker.md: framing update — agent may construct counter-proposal when highest-scoring proposal represents an architectural pattern not desirable long-term; guard added: quality-concern counter-proposals fire at most once per resolution loop
- doc-writer.md: adds minimum-viable accuracy principle: "Write the minimum that would allow a new contributor to understand the project without asking someone who built it. Prefer accuracy over coverage — an incomplete but accurate document is better than a complete but stale one."
- Existing tests/skills/ files asserting binary PASS/FAIL overall_verdict updated to accommodate UNCERTAIN as valid third verdict
- sprint SKILL.md Step 10a HARD-GATE text updated explicitly; task description names sprint SKILL.md as target for rule 18 authorization
- SEQUENCE: before editing completion-verifier.md, retrieve and review tickets 6068-cb2d and 53ee-a9ac from dso ticket show; if conflicting changes found, flag and pause

CONSIDERATIONS:
- [Safeguard] completion-verifier.md, approach-decision-maker.md, doc-writer.md — task descriptions must explicitly name each file
- [Safeguard] sprint SKILL.md is a safeguard file (rule 18); task description must explicitly name it
- [Coordination] 6068-cb2d and 53ee-a9ac may conflict with completion-verifier.md changes; diff-check required first
